calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-23-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gary Royce for Gina Walters (Petitioner).
Houston Watson appeared by telephone for Chanel Walters (Beneficiary).

Mr. Watson stated that he is here in support of Mr. Royce's request. The Court waives defective notice as Counsel was not made aware of anyone's intent to object. With respect to the issue of money not being deposited into an interest bearing account, Mr. Royce stated that he did some calculations, that the annual amount of interest would have been $403.33, and suggested that his attorney's fees be reduced by that amount and the amount be allocated to the Beneficiaries based on their pro rata interests. Mr. Royce also stated that there were only two transactions in the Estate, that he provided the escrow statement for the amount that was deposited from escrow and a copy of the bank statement for the net deposit of $85.00 that was made by his Client. The Amended Petition for Distribution, etc. is taken under submission. Mr. Royce is to provide a revised order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Off Calendar Dec-13-2016 Continued To Jan-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Royce for (administrator) Gina Marie Walters.

Mr. Royce reported that the Franchise Tax Board notice lapses on January 23, 2017, that they will need to amend the petition and asked for a continuance to January 24, 2017. The accounting petition was continued to January 24, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and counsel was instructed to respond to the examiner's notes.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Ideta. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Aug-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-13-2014 Continued To Aug-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Colleen Coen for Gina Walters.

Ms. Coen stated that she has a supplemental declaration in response to the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes. The Clerk directed Ms. Coen to file the declaration and deliver an endorsed copy to the courtroom. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to August 27, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
